title: d-c-fix vinyl wrap Black matt plain 45 cm x 2 m - sticky back plastic roll for furniture, kitchen & cupboards - contact paper sticker self adhesive film
features: UNMATCHED UPCYCLING WITH GERMAN CRAFTSMANSHIP: Transform ordinary furniture into extraordinary pieces with our premium vinyl wrap! Our sticky back plastic offers sustainable change and creative freedom to refresh your decor in no time. Made in Germany for top precision and quality.
PRACTICAL VERSATILITY FOR EVERY ROOM: From cabinets to kitchen fronts—our vinyl wrap adheres to all smooth surfaces. Add a personal touch to your kitchen, bathroom, office, and more.

INNOVATIVE DESIGN, ROBUST PERFORMANCE: Our sticky back plastic is not only water-resistant and heat-resistant up to 70°C but also easy to apply, cut, and clean—delivering impressive, long-lasting results.

SUSTAINABLE FURNITURE DESIGN WITHOUT COMPROMISE: Revitalize your furniture with style and resourcefulness using our vinyl wrap. Refresh your space without purchasing new furniture—a conscious choice for stylish, eco-friendly decor.

ELEGANT PERSONAL STATEMENTS: Choose from our extensive range of designs, colours, and authentic material looks with our sticky back plastic. Your furniture will make a statement and tell your story—without words.
description: From the manufacturer About d-c-fix: The company produces self-adhesive design and functional films as well as decorative wall, floor and table coverings under the brand d-c-fix. For use in the living area, these materials can be processed by the creative end user themselves and thus create new accents to feel good. Companies in the furniture, automotive, fashion and construction sectors as well as the connected objects areas have successfully used the foils, foam films and coated carrier materials for their products for decades. d-c-fix, plain matt black d-c-fix plain film satin finish, no colour choice remains unfulfilled. The self-adhesive d-c-fix adhesive film is characterised by easy processing and high quality. In no time at all, you can redesign furniture, walls or doors. The film is also suitable for crafting. We offer you a special service: we are happy to cut the self-adhesive film in 1 m increments to the desired length. This d-c-fix decorative film can be easily wiped off with a damp cloth if dirty.
